creator: hbsd1374@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254487
picture of video player

Hi, after updating and upgrading, both MPV and VLC stopped working. My OS is FreeBSD 13.3-RELEASE-p3 GENERIC amd64. The VLC version is 3.0.21, and the MPV version is 0.39.0. 
In this thread, the maintainer told me that the problem is with drm_kmod:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=282300

Only this player works fine, but I don't know its name. I've attached a picture of it.

Thanks.
